name: Aisyah R.
text: Finally found halal Chinese dumplings in KL! The fried Sam Xin chicken dumplings were incredible — 18 pieces arranged like a flower. Crispy edges, juicy inside. Will definitely bring my parents here.

name: Jason L.
text: Been coming here since my TARUC days. The lamb gyoza at RM12 for 16 pieces is unbeatable value. The owner is so friendly and the chilli oil is the real deal. Hidden gem of Setapak.

name: Nurin K.
text: Saw the KL Foodie TikTok and had to try it. The hand-pulled noodles were surprisingly good — you can taste the freshness. And the free flow tea is such a nice touch. 10/10.
